name: Joey Levine
abstract: Joey Levine (born May 29, 1947) is an American singer, songwriter and record producer of pop music, who has been active since 1966.

about_quotes.speaker: David Spinozza
about_quotes.evidence: I became his arranger. And he wrote all these great spots... I was the arranger on a lot of those spots because Joey needed somebody to conduct the band and write the stuff out.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Spinozza interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, NY, September 27, 2025
